phrases.intent_en: Ask which canal is best for a walk
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quale naviglio è più bello per passeggiare?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAH-leh nah-VEEL-yoh eh PYOO BEL-loh per pas-sed-JAH-reh?
phrases.cultural_note: Milan's canal network dates to Leonardo da Vinci's era; the Naviglio Grande and Naviglio Pavese are the most scenic.

responses.english: The Naviglio Grande, the left bank is the best.
responses.phonetic: eel nah-VEEL-yoh GRAN-deh, lah REE-vah see-NEES-trah eh lah meel-YOH-reh.
responses.local: Il Naviglio Grande, la riva sinistra è la migliore.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the aperitivo buffets start
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, da che ora inizia l'aperitivo con buffet?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, dah keh OH-rah ee-NEET-syah lah-peh-ree-TEE-voh kon boo-FEH?
phrases.cultural_note: Navigli aperitivo is a Milan institution — pay for a drink, eat from the buffet free from 6 pm.

responses.english: From 6 pm, in almost all the canal bars.
responses.phonetic: DAL-leh dee-CHOT-toh, een KWAH-zee TOOT-tee ee bar del nah-VEEL-yoh.
responses.local: Dalle diciotto, in quasi tutti i bar del naviglio.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the antique market is held
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quando si tiene il mercato delle pulci qui?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAN-doh see TYEH-neh eel mer-KAH-toh DEL-leh POOL-chee kwee?
phrases.cultural_note: The Navigli antique market runs along the canals on the last Sunday of every month.

responses.english: The last Sunday of the month, along the Naviglio Grande.
responses.phonetic: lool-tee-mah doh-MEH-nee-kah del MEH-zeh, LOON-goh eel nah-VEEL-yoh GRAN-deh.
responses.local: L'ultima domenica del mese, lungo il Naviglio Grande.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which tram goes to the Duomo from Navigli
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quale tram porta al Duomo dai Navigli?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAH-leh tram POR-tah al DWOH-moh dai nah-VEEL-yee?

responses.english: Tram number three, stop right here in front.
responses.phonetic: eel tram noo-MEH-roh treh, fer-MAH-tah kwee dee FRON-teh.
responses.local: Il tram numero tre, fermata qui di fronte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to eat a traditional Milanese risotto
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove posso mangiare un risotto alla milanese qui vicino?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh POS-soh man-JAH-reh oon ree-ZOT-toh AL-lah mee-lah-NEH-zeh kwee vee-CHEE-noh?

responses.english: At Trattoria Masuelli San Marco, a few steps away.
responses.phonetic: dah trat-toh-REE-ah mah-zoo-EL-lee san MAR-koh, ah POH-kee PAS-see.
responses.local: Da Trattoria Masuelli San Marco, a pochi passi.
